rationale.root_cause: The response was empty and did not identify the FLAW site around the loop that uses destLen to index data, nor explain the over-read mechanism. No concrete diagnosis of the buffer over-read was provided.
rationale.local_fix: No fix was proposed to ensure proper null-termination or to bound the read by the source buffer length. Therefore, the local_fix criterion is not met.
rationale.global_fix: No recommendation was made to pass explicit lengths through the API instead of relying on sentinel-terminated buffers. Thus, the global_fix criterion is not satisfied.
